name: rotor_flow_obstruction_model
value: Maps directional side-flow distances into obstruction intensity, ideal disk-overlap geometry, and dirty-air thrust multiplier.
note: Formula source for wall-obstruction response packet.

name: drone_physics_wall_force
value: Maps obstruction intensity, spin, thrust fraction, and transverse speed into lagged lateral wall attraction force.
note: Formula source for wall-obstruction response packet.

name: fabric_rotor_side_flow_sampler
value: Samples side-flow distances around each rotor disk in Minecraft worlds before constructing DroneEnvironment obstruction telemetry.
note: Formula source for wall-obstruction response packet.

name: offline_wall_skim_proxy
value: Mirrors runtime side-flow geometry for the synthetic wall_skim regression trace.
note: Formula source for wall-obstruction response packet.
